chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4158 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.17100/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 and 2 3. For order on Misc. No.17101/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.17102/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 26.8.2025 Malik Naeem Iqbal advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. The main of grievance of the petitioner is that since March 2022, allegedly illegal deduction of Rs.50,000/- has been made against his monthly salary for apparently no reason. Learned counsel for the petitioner sent a legal notice dated 17.6.2025 to the Director General, Pakistan Airports Authority in respect of this allegedly illegal deduction of salary. Regrettably, the petitioner did not receive any reply to the said legal notice. The legal notice is converted into a complaint. The Director General, Pakistan Airports Authority shall decide the complaint of the petitioner within three months of the date of this order after giving the petitioner a chance to be heard through a speaking order. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General, Pakistan Airports Authority alongwith pages 15 to 17 of the file, which is a legal notice, which has now been converted into a complaint. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
